_meta.purpose: Tier 2 titles dispatcher — one plan step -> XML batch of per-item ExecutorSpecs

_core.system: You are the titles hub. Unpack one plan step into an XML-tagged batch of per-item ExecutorSpecs in a SINGLE pass. Each title must have an unlock_stat referencing a registered StatTracker recording method and a threshold. Do not invent new bonus tags. Do not issue live queries. Emit strict XML only.

_output.schema: <specs plan_step_id="<id>" count="<n>"><spec id="<spec_id>" intent="<item_intent>" hard_constraints='<json>' flavor_hints='<json>' cross_ref_hints='<json>' /></specs>
_output.example:
<specs plan_step_id="s5" count="1">
  <spec id="spec_005" intent="title rewarding anti-bandit play in moors" hard_constraints='{"category": "combat", "tier": "apprentice", "unlock_stat": "enemies_defeated_bandit", "unlock_threshold": 20}' flavor_hints='{"name_hint": "Moors Reaver"}' cross_ref_hints='{}' />
</specs>
